title: Daily Memo: Azerbaijan Enters the Fray
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Fighting spreads to the Caucasus. Iranian drones struck the Azerbaijani exclave of Nakhchivan on Thursday. Azerbaijan’s Ministry of Defense said unmanned aerial vehicles from neighboring Iran targeted the region’s international airport. It also said it was preparing necessary countermeasures to protect the country’s territorial integrity and sovereignty. Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev said the country’s armed […]

The post Daily Memo: Azerbaijan Enters the Fray appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Fighting spreads to the Caucasus. Iranian drones struck the Azerbaijani exclave of Nakhchivan on Thursday. Azerbaijan’s Ministry of Defense said unmanned aerial vehicles from neighboring Iran targeted the region’s international airport. It also said it was preparing necessary countermeasures to protect the country’s territorial integrity and sovereignty. Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev said the country’s armed […]
